Trakanon's Tooth  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 30
DMG: 2 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 2
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 1.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except CLR PAL DRU MNK BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Trakanon's Tooth
Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 30
DMG: 2 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 2
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 1.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except CLR PAL DRU MNK BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Piercing
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:lowkey
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-19 01:45:02
Page Updated:Mon May 18th, 2015

*This item is the result of a raid event.
Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 60
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Old Sebilis
NPC Name
The Fabled Trakanon
Trakanon

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Trakanon's Teeth
Quest Name
Rune of Scale (Key to Veeshan's Peak)

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Old Sebilis


Uploaded September 19th, 2019 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
Still MQ'able?
QuoteReply
# Nov 02 2006 at 8:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775638010
22 posts
I've been holding on to all 3 medallions for about 2years now, never been able to catch Trak up, or be on a raid to get a tooth.

Started camping him again, only to find out he's become more perma-killed than ever. But in the process I did find someone who had a tooth they'd be willing to MQ, if it works.

Can anyone confirm whether the MQ still works or not? Also, how certain are those of you stating if the NPC returns the tooth, he already has one on, and the other person can just turn in the medallions and get the key?

Thanks again.

Britack, Ranger of Tunare
▲ Page top
from bard's trak?
QuoteReply
# Oct 14 2005 at 12:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591793697396
View User Forum
383 posts
Does the trakanon that spawns after undead bard drop teeth as well?
▲ Page top
RE: from bard's trak?
QuoteReply
# Dec 21 2005 at 7:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1696810595756
402 posts
The Trakanon that spawns after triggering that part of the bard epic does not drop the teeth. The regular one does though.

Edited, Wed Dec 21 18:56:06 2005

QuoteReply
# Jul 05 2004 at 1:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591803886107
46 posts

__DEL__1592255544968

▲ Page top
MQ Works
QuoteReply
# May 20 2004 at 11:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251513984
View User Forum
15 posts
I MQ'd mine, works fine.

Jsut make sure you have a tooth from Trak (2/30) and not a trakasaraus (10/20).

MQ?
QuoteReply
# Sep 30 2003 at 10:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758003398
View User Forum
138 posts
MQ of the tooth won't go thru. I have all the medallions, friend has the tooth. he won't accept bro's tooth, but will take medallions from me. I gave him one as a sacrifice, the jarsath one, and he ate it up.

Anyone else? I have heard of one other story where the tooth couldn't be MQ'd, which was also after the revamp about a month ago.

Thoughts?
▲ Page top
RE: MQ?
QuoteReply
# Feb 06 2004 at 2:56 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1719792979764
246 posts
Are you sure he has the right tooth and not a trankasaur tooth or something like that?

RE: MQ?
QuoteReply
# Oct 10 2003 at 1:47 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1649636240637
87 posts
Worked for me the first time I did the quest, dont know what to say. Only thing I can think of is some how your bro has bad faction or the fact that you did not provide all the pieces? If it isnt that I honestly dont know what to tell ya. About 2 months or so ago, it worked for me on Tunare (before I moved servers).



-Sir

#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 22 2002 at 11:32 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I picked up one of these today and mine has no lifetap effect on it. Charged or otherwise. I expect that somewhere, some guild was collecting these for the lifetap and abusing it somehow. *grin*

#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 16 2001 at 12:53 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) peeps. j00 getting trek tooth and trak tooth mixed up, trek is for a nice dmg/del trak is for the once only 1500 or so proc

# Mar 03 2002 at 2:08 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1685319407916
45 posts
The tooth is not the key to Veeshan's Peak. The tooth is one of the items that must be turned in to get the key.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 18 2001 at 6:29 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post)
#Anonymous, Posted: Feb 16 2001 at 12:10 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) catch that? anyone? says a warrior can use.....ummm not possible....verrant would never let
RE: ummm ok
QuoteReply
# Feb 24 2001 at 3:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591754966424
Sage
119 posts
Notice the "Charges: 1" on it.
It means the lifetap can only be used once.
That's very different from having a weapon that procs a lifetap...
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Feb 11 2001 at 10:08 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Has anyone who's gotten the tooth tried the effect on a critter? What kind of damage does that Deadly lifetap dish out?
#Anonymous, Posted: Dec 27 2000 at 4:27 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) well i see this is 2/30, how many teeth does Trakanon have? 30+? thats at least 2/30x30 dmg LOL,
Not Trak Tooth...
QuoteReply
# Dec 25 2000 at 3:19 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
This tooth is not the same as the 10/20 rogue piercer that drops in trakanons teeth.. This does drop of trakanon in Old Seb. and is part of the quest for the key to get into Veeshens Peek.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Dec 17 2000 at 8:37 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) the trak tooth (short for trakasaur tooth) drops off the trakasaurus rex (or something like that) in the zone trakanons teeth. its the 10/20 rogue piercer.
#Anonymous, Posted: Dec 06 2000 at 6:58 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Trak Tooth is dmg 10 delay 20 no effect and is tradeable, some is messing around.
